_publications._publicationTitle: FAP expression as a marker of malignant transformation enabling in vivo characterization in peripheral nerve sheath tumors: a multimodal and translational study.

_contextSnippet: Spatial transcriptomics data revealed an enrichment of spots with high FAP, SLC2A1, and SLC2A3 expression in MPNST compared to non-MPNST lesions
details: Successfully generated spatial transcriptomics data revealing enrichment of FAP-high spots in MPNSTs compared to non-MPNST lesions
